Metro-North September 2025 total ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North served 6.3 million customers in September, which is an 8.2% increase from 2024, and a new record of 87.5% of pre-pandemic ridership.

tool_args.label: No changes to 2025 Work Plans

payload.claim_text: There were no changes to the LIRR or Metro-North Work Plans. The 2025 Metro-North and LIRR Work Plans are filed with the records of this meeting.
payload.subject: LIRR and Metro-North 2025 Work Plans

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Rehabilitation - Phase One completed

payload.status: Phase One completed ahead of schedule and under budget
payload.description: The Park Avenue Viaduct is over 100 years old and carries every train serving Grand Central Terminal, which is 98% of all Metro-North mainline service. Phase One was completed ahead of schedule and under budget.

tool_args.label: Metro-North and LIRR Ticket Vending Machine Replacement

payload.project_name: Metro-North and LIRR Ticket Vending Machine and Ticket Office Machine Replacement
payload.status: Five pilot machines launched in September 2025; full installation began mid-October 2025 with scheduled completion mid-2026
payload.description: New contract with Scheidt & Bachmann to replace aging ticket vending machines and ticket office machines. Total of 248 TVMs and 37 TOMs.
payload.operator: Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road

warnings: project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.
project.operator is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Operator is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: operated_by.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Bridge replacement, Manhasset

payload.status: completed on budget and four months ahead of schedule
payload.description: Fully replaced the existing 128-year-old bridge structure in Manhasset.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Hicksville signal system modernization

payload.status: scheduled for weekend of November 8 and 9, 2025
payload.description: Modernization of the signal system at Hicksville to increase capacity and provide parallel movement through the interlocking. Bus service will be provided during work.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal to Albany roundtrip train service

payload.project_name: Grand Central Terminal to Albany roundtrip train service
payload.description: Metro-North will operate a roundtrip train between Grand Central Terminal and Albany beginning early next Spring. A result of loss of capacity from Amtrak's East River Tunnel project. The service will be an extension of an existing Hudson Line Poughkeepsie train.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Shopper Specials on New Haven Line

payload.description: Metro-North will be operating Shopper Specials on the New Haven Line. From Saturday November 29 to Saturday January 3, there will be four extra inbound trains during morning and early afternoon, and four extra outbound trains later in the afternoon. On Sundays from November 30 to January 4, there will be two extra inbound trains during morning to early afternoon, and two extra outbound trains in the afternoon.

tool_args.label: Number of Siemens Charger locomotives accepted

payload.raw_value_text: four have been accepted and are in revenue service

tool_args.label: Siemens Charger locomotives undergoing acceptance testing

payload.raw_value_text: three are undergoing acceptance testing on property

tool_args.label: Metro-North ticket vending machine availability

payload.raw_value_text: legacy ticket vending machines are the backbone of fare payment, with 97% availability and generating about 30% of all ticket sales

tool_args.label: Legacy TVM share of Metro-North ticket sales

payload.raw_value_text: generating about 30% of all ticket sales

tool_args.label: LIRR approximately 12.9 million ahead of budget forecast

payload.raw_value_text: LIRR was approximately 12.9 million ahead of its budget forecast

tool_args.label: Metro-North OTP prior period

payload.raw_value_text: the significant increase of on-time performance from 94% to 98%
payload.description: Board Member Zuckerman referenced increase from 94% to 98% without impacting safety

tool_args.label: LIRR serves five major event venues

payload.raw_value_text: the LIRR serves five major event venues, with three located on main line stations

tool_args.label: LIRR provides primary mode for over 600 major events annually

payload.raw_value_text: LIRR provides a primary mode of transportation for over 600 major events each year

tool_args.label: Approval of September 29, 2025 Joint LIRR/Metro-North Committee Meeting Minutes

payload.description: The Committee approved the minutes of the September 29, 2025 Joint LIRR/Metro-North Committee Meeting.

tool_args.label: Dear New York display at Grand Central Terminal

payload.description: Successful Dear New York display at Grand Central Terminal and adjacent subway stations from October 6 through October 19. More than 150 digital screens displayed portraits and stories from Brandon Stanton's Humans of New York archive. A grand piano was placed in the main concourse with concerts by Juilliard School students and alumni.

tool_args.label: Adjournment of Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committees Meeting

payload.description: The Committee unanimously voted to adjourn the meeting.

tool_args.label: Laser train operating daily with great success

payload.claim_text: President Vonashek stated that the laser train has been operating daily with great success.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad laser train

tool_args.label: Metro-North safety performance - customer injury rate flat

payload.claim_text: The reportable customer injury rate was flat from the prior year.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad safety performance - 12-month period ending August 2025

tool_args.label: Employee injury improvement through collaboration

payload.claim_text: This was achievable through collaboration with our labor partners, addressing root causes, and developing corrective action plans.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad employee injury rate improvement

tool_args.label: Metro-North annual Open House in New Haven CCO shop

payload.description: Metro-North held its annual Open House in New Haven CCO shop on Saturday, October 4 with over 2600 attendees including Metro-North employees, retirees, and the public.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Bridge project implemented by MTA C&D

payload.description: President Free thanked the crew and the partners at MTA Construction and Development

tool_args.label: GCT-Albany service related to Amtrak East River Tunnel project

payload.description: This is a result of the loss of capacity as part of Amtrak's East River Tunnel project

payload.description: Metro-North President Justin Vonashek reported OTP results

tool_args.label: Robert Free presented LIRR President's Report

payload.description: LIRR President Rob Free shared ridership results

tool_args.label: MTAPD Chief Taffe presented crime report

payload.description: MTAPD Chief of Operations Thomas J. Taffe presented the crime and policing report for September 2025
